name: Poppy Seed Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt margarine.
2. Saute mushrooms until tender.
3. Stir in chicken, soup, sour cream and pimiento; mix well.
4. Spoon mixture into a greased 2-quart casserole.
5. In a small bowl combine topping ingredients (half cup margarine, the crushed crackers and two teaspoons poppy seed).
6. Sprinkle topping over the chicken.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
